name: Qwen 3.5 9B
notes: Top benchmarks for its size (MMLU-Pro 82.5). Native structured output/JSON, strong instruction following (IFEval ~92%). Released March 2, 2026. Dense model, 262K context.

name: Qwen 3.5 4B
notes: Lightweight Qwen3.5 variant. Good structured output. Released March 2, 2026. Dense model, 262K context.

name: Qwen 3.5 27B
notes: Strong dense model from Qwen3.5 medium series. Released February 24, 2026. 262K context, excellent instruction following.

name: Qwen 3.5 35B-A3B (MoE)
notes: MoE model: 35B total but only 3B active per token - very fast inference. Released February 24, 2026. 262K context.

name: Gemma 3 12B Instruct
notes: Google's Gemma 3. Built-in function calling and structured output support. Reliable JSON generation. 128K context. Released March 2025.

name: Gemma 3 27B Instruct (QAT)
notes: Quantization-Aware Trained - preserves quality much better than post-training quantization. Outperforms Llama3-405B on LMArena. Excellent structured output. 128K context.

name: Gemma 3 4B Instruct
notes: Compact Gemma 3 competitive with Gemma2-27B. Good structured output. 128K context. Released March 2025.

name: Phi-4 Mini Instruct
notes: Microsoft's 3.8B model. Strong reasoning for size. 200K vocab, 128K context. Released February 2025.

name: Phi-4 14B
notes: Microsoft's 14B reasoning model. Excels at complex reasoning, math. Released January 2025.

name: Phi-4 Reasoning Plus
notes: Enhanced reasoning variant with outcome-based RL. 14B params. Strong for complex extraction tasks.

name: Mistral Small 3.1 24B
notes: 24B latency-optimized model. Parity with LLaMA 3.3 70B at 3x faster. Multimodal (vision+text). Released March 2025.

name: Llama 4 Scout 17B-16E Instruct
notes: Meta's Llama 4 MoE: 109B total, 17B active per token with 16 experts. 10M context window. Released April 2025. Large total size but efficient MoE inference.

name: Qwen 3 8B
notes: Strong 8B model with thinking/non-thinking modes. Good structured output. Released April 2025.

name: Qwen 3 14B
notes: Excellent instruction following (IFEval strict ~88%). Strong JSON/structured output. Released April 2025.

name: Qwen 3 32B
notes: Largest dense Qwen3. Outperforms DeepSeek-R1 on 17/23 benchmarks. Excellent for information extraction. Released April 2025.

name: DeepSeek-R1 Distill Qwen 14B
notes: Reasoning-focused distillation of DeepSeek-R1 into Qwen-14B. Strong chain-of-thought. Released January 2025. Note: bf16 (not quantized).

name: DeepSeek-R1 Distill Qwen 32B
notes: Largest practical DeepSeek-R1 distillation. Strong reasoning. Released January 2025.

name: DeepSeek-R1 Distill Qwen 7B
notes: Compact reasoning model. Good for chain-of-thought extraction. Released January 2025.
